items.title: Madrigal outlays $1bn for Arrowhead’s siRNA MASH asset
items.summary: As with its previous siRNA deal, Madrigal plans to explore whether gene-silencing could complement its lead drug Rezdiffra.

items.title: Non-viral gene therapies emerge as key players amid viral safety bottlenecks
items.summary: Non-viral gene therapies may hold potential to overcome some safety, pricing and manufacturing hurdles linked to viral alternatives.

items.title: UCB doubles down on TCEs with $2.2bn Candid buyout
items.summary: UCB’s Candid acquisition marks its second foray into the TCE space – closely following a $1.1bn licensing deal with TCE specialist, Antengene.

items.title: Lannett, Lanexa Biologics and Sunshine Lake secure FDA approval for Langlara
items.summary: Sunshine Lake Pharma, Lannett and its wholly owned subsidiary Lanexa Biologics have received FDA approval for Langlara.

items.title: Tell us: Is hospital connectivity keeping up with the demands of modern care in 2026?
items.summary: A new global survey from GlobalData and Ericsson explores how healthcare leaders are navigating hospital connectivity challenges, and what it means for the future of digital care delivery.
